examples: Mongolia seemed an unlikely candidate as the pacesetter for political change in Asia.
That firm was the pacesetter in car design for many years.
The first caucuses are two years away, but the early running is under way without a pacesetter.
Ridden by John Velazquez, 4-5 favorite Verrazano raced comfortably behind early pacesetter Chrisandthecapper before taking charge on the turn.
